title: HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE JOSEPHINE COUNTY GRANTS PASS HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 132 NE B Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Monday-Friday noon-4pm (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-5088 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in during clinic hours. Call or visit website for testing schedule. FEES: Suggested donation of $25; no one turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 1pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Third floor of Newman Methodist Community Building Services: AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling Hepatitis Testing HIV Testing Safe Sex Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
